images.caption:
Figure 2:AxonAD overview. The online reconstruction encoder computes self attention using queries𝐐rec\mathbf{Q}_{\mathrm{rec}}. In parallel, a history-only predictor forecasts𝐐^pred\widehat{\mathbf{Q}}_{\mathrm{pred}}and is trained to match EMA target
queries𝐐tgt\mathbf{Q}_{\mathrm{tgt}}(stop-gradient). Query mismatch on the
last valid timesteps yieldsdqd_{q}, and reconstruction yieldsdrecd_{\mathrm{rec}}.
Attention divergence (KL tail) is not included in the default scoring pipeline.
